why_golfers_like_it: Availability for private events and corporate gatherings
Flexible rental options for various group sizes

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen and food service available
Full bar service with cocktails and beverages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are welcome to bring your own clubs, but rental clubs are also available on-site for your convenience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: While the venue offers a full bar and kitchen service, outside food and drinks may be restricted. Please check with the venue directly for their specific policy.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing a full 18 holes on a simulator usually takes between 2 to 3 hours, depending on your pace and the simulator's capacity.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Back Nine Golf is family-friendly and welcomes players of all ages, making it suitable for families and junior golfers.
